entities.name: Network Asset
entities.context: Framework for evaluating contacts with dimensions: connections, influence, advocacy potential

entities.name: Connections
entities.context: Rating dimension (7/10) measuring network reach in higher ed vendors and product community

entities.name: Influence
entities.context: Rating dimension (6/10) measuring organizational seniority level

entities.name: Intelligence Blocks
entities.context: Structured content system for meeting documentation with numbered block types

entities.name: B01 Detailed Recap
entities.context: Intelligence block type for meeting summary

entities.name: B02 Commitments
entities.context: Intelligence block type for tracking commitments made

entities.name: B08 Stakeholder Intelligence
entities.context: Intelligence block type for stakeholder analysis

entities.name: B13 Plan of Action
entities.context: Intelligence block type for next steps

entities.name: B21 Key Moments
entities.context: Intelligence block type for notable meeting highlights

entities.name: B26 Meeting Metadata
entities.context: Intelligence block type for meeting logistics and context

entities.name: higher ed vendors
entities.context: Industry segment referenced as part of contact's network

entities.name: product community
entities.context: Professional community referenced as part of contact's network

relationships.context: Connections is a rating dimension within Network Asset framework
Influence is a rating dimension within Network Asset framework
Advocacy Potential is a rating dimension within Network Asset framework
B01 is a block type in the Intelligence Blocks system

B13 is a block type in the Intelligence Blocks system
